ns0:entry.ns0:title: GeyserMC/Geyser
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GeyserMC/Geyser
Language: java
A bridge/proxy allowing you to connect to Minecraft: Java Edition servers with Minecraft: Bedrock Edition.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OtterMind/Chat2DB
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OtterMind/Chat2DB
Language: java
AI-driven database tool and SQL client, The hottest GUI client, supporting MySQL, Oracle, PostgreSQL, DB2, SQL Server, DB2, SQLite, H2, ClickHouse, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/fory
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/fory
Language: java
A blazingly fast multi-language serialization framework for idiomatic domain objects, schema IDL, and cross-language data exchange.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/kafka
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/kafka
Language: java
Apache Kafka - A distributed event streaming platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/paimon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/paimon
Language: java
Apache Paimon is a lake format that enables building a Realtime Lakehouse Architecture with Flink and Spark for both streaming and batch operations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/seatunnel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/seatunnel
Language: java
SeaTunnel is a multimodal, high-performance, distributed, massive data integration tool.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ashishps1/awesome-low-level-design
Language: java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bethington/ghidra-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bethington/ghidra-mcp
Language: java
Ghidra MCP Server — 200+ MCP tools for AI-powered reverse engineering. GUI plugin + headless server, lazy tool loading, convention enforcement, batch operations, Ghidra Server integration, and Docker deployment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cryptomator/cryptomator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cryptomator/cryptomator
Language: java
Cryptomator for Windows, macOS, and Linux: Secure client-side encryption for your cloud storage, ensuring privacy and control over your data.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dbeaver/dbeaver
Language: java
Free universal database tool and SQL client

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/debezium/debezium
Language: java
Change data capture for a variety of databases. Please log issues at https://github.com/debezium/dbz/issues.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: elastic/elasticsearch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/elastic/elasticsearch
Language: java

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: krahets/hello-algo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/krahets/hello-algo
Language: java
《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、English、日本語，提供 Python, Java, C++, C, C#, JS, Go, Swift, Rust, Ruby, Kotlin, TS, Dart 等代码实现

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nageoffer/ragent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nageoffer/ragent
Language: java
企业级 Agentic RAG 智能体 - 全链路覆盖文档解析、多路检索、意图识别、问题重写、会话记忆、MCP 工具调用与深度思考。面向真实业务场景，从 0 到 1 完整工程实现。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vaadin/platform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vaadin/platform
Language: java
Vaadin platform 10+ is a Java web development platform based on Vaadin web components. If you don't know to which repository your bug report should be filed, use this and we'll move it to the right one.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xuxueli/xxl-job
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xuxueli/xxl-job
Language: java
A distributed task scheduling framework.（分布式任务调度平台XXL-JOB）
